what: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses

text: Automatically code responses coding scheme

title: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses
Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses
text: coding_scheme List character. Coding scheme unit IQB Studio Lite. responses List character. Unit responses IQB Testcenter. manual List character. Manual codes potentially overwrite response data. Defaults `"null"` (treated way `NA`).

title: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses
text: data frame.

what: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses_array
title: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses_array
text: Automatically code responses coding scheme

title: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses_array
code: code_responses_array(   coding_scheme,   responses,   collapse = ";;;",   wrap_start = "[[[",   wrap_end = "]]]",   missing = "___MISSING___" )

title: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses_array
text: coding_scheme List. Coding scheme unit IQB Studio Lite. responses List. Unit responses IQB Testcenter. collapse Character. List values concatenated character. Defaults `";;;"`. wrap_start Character. List values wrapped character. Defaults `"[[["`. wrap_end Character. List values wrapped character. Defaults `"´]]]"`. missing Character. Placeholder missing values. transformed `NA`. Defaults `"___MISSING___"`.

title: Automatically code responses with coding scheme — code_responses_array
text: data frame. Please value column coerced character, .e., list entries `c("", "b")` concatenated `[[[;;;b]]]`  (e.g., drag--drop marker variables).

title: Extract variable locations from unit definition — extract_variable_location
text: units Tibble. Must contain column `definition` contains unit definitions. Please note, recommended extract 20 unit definitions time call memory-consuming. collapse Character. List values concatenated character. Defaults `";;;"`. wrap_start Character. List values wrapped character. Defaults `"[[["`. wrap_end Character. List values wrapped character. Defaults `"´]]]"`. missing Character. Placeholder missing values. transformed `NA`. Defaults `"___MISSING___"`.

title: Extract variable locations from unit definition — extract_variable_location
text: data frame.
